𝔸1.0.build-request@2026-03-02
γ≔ci-pipeline

⟦Ω:Meta⟧{
  sender≜@ci-agent
  receiver≜@builder-agent
  intent≜request
  id≜"ci-build-001"
  timestamp≜1740873600
  reply_to≜"null"
  protocol≜1
}

⟦Σ:Types⟧{
  BuildRequest≜{repo:URI, branch:String, commit:SHA, priority:Level}
  URI≜String
  SHA≜String
  Level≜{low, normal, high, critical}
  BuildStatus≜{queued, running, success, failure}
}

⟦Γ:Rules⟧{
  ∀r∈BuildRequest:commit(r)∈SHA
  ∀r∈BuildRequest:branch(r)∈String
  SHA→length(40)∧charset(hex)
  build(r)⇒notify(@ci-agent, BuildStatus)
  failure(build)⇒report(logs, @ci-agent)
}

⟦Λ:Funcs⟧{
  build≜λ(repo, branch, commit).trigger_pipeline(repo, branch, commit)
  notify≜λ(agent, status).send_status_update(agent, status)
  report≜λ(logs, agent).forward_build_logs(agent, logs)
  validate≜λ(commit).verify_sha_exists(commit, branch)
}

⟦Ε⟧⟨δ≜0.82;φ≜100;τ≜◊⁺⁺⟩

```
repo   ≜ "https://github.com/org/my-service"
branch ≜ "feature/oauth-refresh"
commit ≜ "a3f9c21d84e07b5612f3c89d0e14a6b27f580041"
priority ≜ high
```

𝔸1.0.incident-alert@2026-03-02
γ≔ops-monitoring

⟦Ω:Meta⟧{
  sender≜@monitor-agent
  receiver≜@ops-team
  intent≜alert
  id≜"inc-20260302-pay-001"
  timestamp≜1740873600
  reply_to≜"null"
  protocol≜1
}

⟦Σ:Types⟧{
  Incident≜{service:String, severity:Nat, priority:Nat, latency_ms:Nat, status:IncidentStatus}
  IncidentStatus≜{active, mitigating, resolved}
  CausalLink≜{effect:Event, cause:Event}
  Resolution≜{action:String, owner:Role, urgency:UrgencyLevel}
  UrgencyLevel≜{immediate, high, normal, low}
  Role≜{oncall-engineer, dba-team, platform-team}
}

⟦Γ:Rules⟧{
  ∀i∈Incident: i.severity=2 ∧ i.priority=4 ⇒ escalate(i, oncall-engineer)
  ∀i∈Incident: i.latency_ms > 2000 ⇒ breach(SLA, i.service)
  traffic_spike → db_connection_pool_exhaustion → high_latency → payments_degraded
  ∃r∈Resolution: r.urgency=immediate ⇒ execute(r) ∧ notify(ops-team, r)
}

⟦Λ:Funcs⟧{
  causalChain≜λ(effect).trace_root_cause(effect)
  escalate≜λ(incident, role).page(role, incident.priority)
  resolve≜λ(rec).apply(rec.action, rec.owner)
  mitigate≜λ(svc).scale_connection_pool(svc) ∧ enable_rate_limiting(svc) ∧ drain_excess_traffic(svc)
}

⟦Ε⟧⟨δ≜0.82;φ≜100;τ≜◊⁺⁺⟩

---

**Incident Payload:**

```
service         : payments
severity        : 2
priority        : 4
status          : active
latency_obs_ms  : 2340
threshold_ms    : 2000
breach          : SLA violated

causal_chain:
  [1] traffic_spike          → trigger
  [2] db_conn_pool_exhausted ← caused_by(traffic_spike)
  [3] high_latency           ← caused_by(db_conn_pool_exhausted)

resolution_recommendation:
  action  : scale_connection_pool ∧ enable_rate_limiting ∧ shed_non_critical_traffic
  owner   : dba-team ∧ oncall-engineer
  urgency : immediate
```
